scenarios.description: setScores accepts a valid power-of-2 length (4) and updates scores and height
scenarios.precondition: MiniMaxAlgorithm instance with initial scores and height known via constructor
scenarios.expectedResult: getScores() returns the newly set array [10,20,30,40] and getHeight() returns 2

scenarios.description: setScores rejects a non-power-of-2 length (3) and preserves existing scores and height
scenarios.precondition: MiniMaxAlgorithm instance with initial copy of scores and height; capturing System.out for error message
scenarios.expectedResult: getScores() remains unchanged; getHeight() remains unchanged; System.out contains "The number of scores must be a power of 2."
pseudocode: assertOutContains("The number of scores must be a power of 2.");

scenarios.description: setScores accepts the minimal power-of-2 length (1) and updates scores and height to zero
scenarios.precondition: MiniMaxAlgorithm instance with initial scores and height
